channel.title: Health on MinWeb
channel.description: Recent content in Health on MinWeb

item.title: TCE: The Common Cleaner Linked to Parkinson’s Disease Risk
item.description: Discover how the industrial solvent TCE, once common in household cleaners and adhesives, has been scientifically linked to an increased risk of Parkinson’s.

item.title: What Nutritionists Actually Order at McDonald’s
item.description: Curious what registered dietitians actually eat at McDonald's? Discover the simple, strategic hacks they use to order smarter fuel without the nutritional...

item.title: The Truth About Ultra-Processed Foods and Your Health
item.description: Discover how ultra-processed foods impact your health and learn to identify these industrial products using the NOVA classification system for better nutrition.

item.title: Does Marriage Lower Your Cancer Risk? What the Data Shows
item.description: A new analysis of over 4 million U.S. cancer cases reveals a significant link between marital status and cancer risk, but what do these findings really mean?

item.title: Energy Drinks and Heart Risk: A Teen’s Fatal Tragedy
item.description: A tragic wrongful death lawsuit highlights the hidden dangers of high-caffeine energy drinks and their potential to cause fatal heart risks in teenagers.

item.title: Why Nutrition Misinformation Is Everywhere (And How to Cope)
item.description: Learn why nutrition misinformation is everywhere and discover practical, science-backed strategies to filter out the noise and make truly healthy choices.

item.title: Why You’re Confused About Nutrition: It’s Not Your Fault
item.description: Stop feeling guilty about your confusion in the grocery aisle; discover how manipulative wellness propaganda and social media algorithms drive your frustration.

item.title: Post-Mastectomy Pain Syndrome: Why You Aren't Alone
item.description: If you are suffering from chronic pain after a mastectomy, you aren't alone; learn the truth about Post-Mastectomy Pain Syndrome and how to reclaim your life.

item.title: Life After Mastectomy: Understanding Chronic PMPS Pain
item.description: Struggling with persistent discomfort after surgery? Discover the realities of Post-Mastectomy Pain Syndrome and learn how to recognize and manage symptoms.

item.title: Post-Mastectomy Pain Syndrome: Why Chronic Pain Persists
item.description: Discover why chronic pain persists after breast surgery and learn the truth about Post-Mastectomy Pain Syndrome, a condition affecting up to 50% of patients.

item.title: The Hidden Chronic Pain After Mastectomy Surgery
item.description: Learn the truth about Post-Mastectomy Pain Syndrome, a chronic condition affecting up to 60% of patients, and discover why this hidden struggle deserves...

item.title: Why Beans Are the Most Underrated Superfood
item.description: Discover why beans are nature’s most underrated superfood, providing essential protein, fiber, and longevity benefits that can transform your daily nutrition.

item.title: Gym Story Saturday: Why Your Gym Anxiety Is Normal
item.description: Feeling intimidated at the gym? Discover why gym anxiety is a universal experience and learn how to navigate fitness culture with confidence and ease.

item.title: Why We’re Still Hooked on Full-Sugar Soda
item.description: Despite the known health risks, full-sugar soda remains a global favorite because of its unique biological impact on taste receptors and superior mouthfeel.

item.title: Nutrition Myths in 2026: Why You Can Stop Fearing Eggs
item.description: Stop fearing your breakfast and cut through the 2026 nutrition noise as we debunk outdated myths about eggs, cholesterol, and gluten with current science.

item.title: The Biggest Nutrition Myths We Finally Debunked in 2026
item.description: Discover the latest 2026 nutrition science as we debunk common myths about eggs, fruit sugar, and gluten to help you separate health facts from misinformation.

item.title: The Biggest Nutrition Myths We Still Believe in 2026
item.description: Stop following outdated nutrition advice and discover the science-backed truth behind 2026 dietary guidelines to improve your health without unnecessary stress.

item.title: Why “Everything in Moderation” Fails Some People
item.description: Stop blaming your willpower for failed moderation and learn why an abstainer mindset might be the key to finally overcoming your food cravings for good.

item.title: The Case for Body Silence: Why You Should Stop Commenting
item.description: Stop commenting on people's bodies to protect their mental and physical well-being by choosing the respectful, scientifically-backed practice of body silence.

item.title: Why You Should Stop Commenting on People’s Bodies
item.description: Learn why commenting on people's bodies—even with good intentions—can cause lasting harm and discover why choosing to mind your own business is better for all.
